nodes.recentposition: Marketing and Finance Associate at Aivita Biomedical in Irvine, CA
nodes.bios: Hellooo! My name is Amanda Nguyen, and I initiated in the spring quarter of my junior year. Some of my hobbies outside of school are skiing, snowboarding, autocross, and traveling. Additionally, I am always on the hunt for new and yummy restaurants and cafes. Ask me about some of my favorite food and dessert spots! :)
